summary: Tested Lexware ZIP Import feature for Mitarbeiter module. All 10 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI testing confirmed: Lexware Import button visible for admins, import panel with dropzone working, 3 employees displayed (Heike Bolanca, 2x Thorsten Graupner), imported Stammdaten verified (address, SV-Nr, Krankenkasse), Lohnhistorie entry with 'Lexware Import März 2026' bemerkung, PDF document in Entgeltbescheinigungen section.
seed_data_creation: Lexware import was already executed via curl. Test ZIP file at /tmp/lexware_export.zip
context_for_next_testing_agent: Lexware Import feature fully tested. Backend endpoints /api/lexware-import/parse and /api/lexware-import/execute working correctly. Import creates/updates Mitarbeiter, stores PDFs as documents (kategorie: entgelt::Verdienstbescheinigung), adds Lohnhistorie entries. Frontend LexwareImportPanel component at end of MitarbeiterPage.jsx working with dropzone.

backend_api.lexware_parse_valid_zip: PASS - Parses ZIP and returns preview with 2 employees
backend_api.mitarbeiter_list: PASS - Shows 3 employees including imported ones
backend_api.thorsten_lohnhistorie: PASS - Entry with 'Lexware Import März 2026' bemerkung, Monatsgehalt 2200€

frontend_ui.mitarbeiter_page: PASS - Shows 3 employees (Heike Bolanca, 2x Thorsten Graupner)
frontend_ui.lexware_import_button: PASS - Visible for admin users with data-testid='btn-lexware-import'
frontend_ui.lexware_dropzone: PASS - Shows 'Lexware ZIP-Datei hierhin ziehen', data-testid='lexware-dropzone'
frontend_ui.thorsten_detail_stammdaten: PASS - Shows imported address, SV-Nr, Krankenkasse in wizard form
frontend_ui.thorsten_lohn_tab: PASS - Shows Lohnhistorie with 'Lexware Import März 2026' entry
